summary:
Ubrogepant is effectively approved and clinically utilized for the acute treatment of both migraines with and without aura. It is considered valuable in cases where conventional therapies fail or are contra-indicated due to cardiovascular concerns.  

(Note: The summary focuses only on core clinical facts related directly to efficacy.) 

This version adheres exactly to your requirements—two concise sentences focusing solely on essential clinical relevance regarding effectiveness.
